name: Fundament ÷ Murk = ...x... prt. 2!
description:
Fundament and Murk join forces again for a night of Drum & Bass, Jungle and other forms of radical bass music. 

Shared principles: Old school. New school. Future. Bass. Vynl. Digital. Pressure. Experiment.

Genres: Half time, Liquid, Techstep, Footwork, Darkstep, Minimal. Atmospheric, 90s jump up. UK Bass & more.

Venue: The warm, expansive vibes of oslo's sou
ndest cultural institution - MiR.

The DJs:
Xcstnz
Ross B
Digital Cookboy
More tbc

CC: 64 nok
